scopes.name: default
scopes.paradigm: ASGI web framework built on a FastAPI() / APIRouter() class pair: routes are declared with method-specific decorators (@app.get, @router.post, etc.) that call add_api_route() under the hood — there is no Flask-style @app.route(..., methods=[]) and no explicit APIRoute() instantiation at call sites. Routers are composed with app.include_router(router, prefix=...). Request data arrives exclusively through function-parameter injection: a Pydantic BaseModel subclass typed as a parameter is treated as the JSON body; bare primitive types named to match path segments are path params; all others default to query params; explicit placement uses FieldInfo subclasses (Query(), Path(), Header(), Cookie(), Body(), Form(), File()) either as default values or via Annotated[T, Query(...)]. Dependency injection uses Depends(callable) — a frozen dataclass with use_cache and scope fields — resolved by solve_dependencies() which introspects the call's signature recursively, runs sync deps in a threadpool, runs async deps with await, and manages generator-based deps (yield-style) through an AsyncExitStack, caching by (callable, tuple(args)) key per request. Error handling is raise-based: HTTPException(status_code=..., detail=...) is the user-facing error primitive (extends Starlette's HTTPException); RequestValidationError and ResponseValidationError are raised automatically by the framework when Pydantic validation fails on incoming or outgoing data and are caught by registered exception handlers (http_exception_handler, request_validation_exception_handler). Response typing relies on response_model= on the decorator or the function's return annotation, which the framework auto-infers into a ModelField for serialization; Annotated[T, ...] is used pervasively in the framework's own public API. Conspicuously absent: no request.json() / request.form() calls in user endpoint code, no manual validation, no methods= kwarg on route decorators, no class-based views as the primary pattern, no new instantiation at call sites, no explicit Response return required for plain data.
